project: Fresh on the field, but gets the job done.
Sharper aim, faster response — built for precision hits.
Worn by war — still hits like a storm.
Forged in sand — stronger, tougher, unstoppable.
Clean build, deadly aim — precision at its finest.
Engineered for dominance — power beyond limits.
Cold as ice — strikes without mercy.
Born in fire — built to destroy everything.
